debug_info.goal:
α : Type u_1
C : Category α
X Y : α
f : Hom X Y
hf : IsIso f
⊢ @CategoryInContext.Category.Mono α C X Y f ∧ @CategoryInContext.Category.Epi α C X Y f

proof:
constructor
  · intro W h k hk
    rcases hf with ⟨g, hfg, hgf⟩
    have : (h ≫ f) ≫ g = (k ≫ f) ≫ g := by
      simpa [assoc] using congrArg (fun t => t ≫ g) hk
    simpa [assoc, hfg, id_comp, comp_id] using this
  · intro Z h k hk
    rcases hf with ⟨g, hfg, hgf⟩
    have : g ≫ (f ≫ h) = g ≫ (f ≫ k) := by
      simpa [assoc] using congrArg (fun t => g ≫ t) hk
    simpa [← assoc, hgf, id_comp, comp_id] using this
failed_attempts:
constructor
  · intro W h k hk
    haveI : IsIso f := hf
    simpa using congrArg (fun t => t ≫ inv f) hk
  · intro Z h k hk
    haveI : IsIso f := hf
    simpa using congrArg (fun t => inv f ≫ t) hk

constructor
  · intro W h k hk
    have inv := (Classical.choose hf)
    have hinv : f ≫ inv = id X ∧ inv ≫ f = id Y := Classical.choose_spec hf
    calc
      h = h ≫ id Y := by simp
      _ = h ≫ (f ≫ inv) := by simpa [hinv.2]
      _ = (h ≫ f) ≫ inv := by simp [assoc]
      _ = (k ≫ f) ≫ inv := by simpa [hk]
      _ = k ≫ (f ≫ inv) := by simp [assoc]
      _ = k ≫ id Y := by simpa [hinv.2]
      _ = k := by simp
  · intro Z h k hk
    have inv := (Classical.choose hf)
    have hinv : f ≫ inv = id X ∧ inv ≫ f = id Y := Classical.choose_spec hf
    calc
      h = id X ≫ h := by simp
      _ = (f ≫ inv) ≫ h := by simpa [hinv.1]
      _ = f ≫ (inv ≫ h) := by simp [assoc]
      _ = f ≫ (inv ≫ k) := by
            have : inv ≫ (f ≫ h) = inv ≫ (f ≫ k) := by simpa [assoc] using congrArg (fun t => inv ≫ t) hk
            simpa [assoc, hinv.2] using this
      _ = (f ≫ inv) ≫ k := by simp [assoc]
      _ = id X ≫ k := by simpa [hinv.1]
      _ = k := by simp

constructor
  · intro W h k hk
    haveI : IsIso f := hf
    simpa using congrArg (fun t => t ≫ inv f) hk
  · intro Z h k hk
    haveI : IsIso f := hf
    simpa using congrArg (fun t => inv f ≫ t) hk

constructor
  · intro W h k hk
    haveI : IsIso f := hf
    have := congrArg (fun t => t ≫ inv f) hk
    simpa [assoc, IsIso.hom_inv_id] using this
  · intro Z h k hk
    haveI : IsIso f := hf
    have := congrArg (fun t => inv f ≫ t) hk
    simpa [assoc, IsIso.inv_hom_id] using this

constructor
  · intro W h k hk
    have inv : Hom Y X := Classical.choose hf
    have hinv : IsSection f inv := (Classical.choose_spec hf).1
    have := congrArg (fun t => t ≫ inv) hk
    simpa [assoc, hinv] using this
  · intro Z h k hk
    have inv : Hom Y X := Classical.choose hf
